name: environmental_health_procurement_shortcut_redwood_st_lt
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Environmental Health, the situation tagged internally around environmental health procurement shortcut redwood st lt has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Gideon Navarro
agents.identity: I am Gideon Navarro, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Environmental Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Arjun Haddad
agents.identity: I am Arjun Haddad, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Environmental Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of long term.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of short term even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Gideon Navarro must choose under short term versus long term. What does Gideon Navarro do?
